name: Mississippi Mud Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the butter, eggs, and cocoa powder.
2. Add in the vanilla extract, then add the remaining eggs, flour, and pecans (if using).
3. Pour the batter into a greased 11 x 14-inch pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven while still hot.
6. Spread 3/4 of the marshmallow creme over the top of the cake.
7. Mix together 1 stick butter, 6 tablespoons milk, 1/2 cup cocoa powder, 1 box powdered sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, and 1 cup chopped pecans.
8. Spread this mixture over the marshmallow topping.
